title: QUEST 35059 Electric Serrated Carving Knife/Cut Turkey, Beef, Chicken, Lamb, Ham, Bread, Vegetables, & Fruits With Ease / 120W / White Colour
features: ELECTRIC CARVING KNIFE – This electric carving knife is the perfect kitchen accessory to assist you at mealtimes, and allows you to effortlessly carve meats, breads and fruits & veg for Sunday roasts and Christmas dinners.

STAINLESS STEEL BLADE – This carving knife features one detachable stainless-steel blade and features a blade release button to allow you to remove it quickly and easily, ready to be cleaned either by hand, or in the dishwasher.

120W POWER – The beauty of this device is that it has enough power to effortlessly carve meats and breads, but is also whisper quiet in the process. The knife also features a safety on/off button for additional peace of mind.

KITCHEN CLASSIC – In the run up to big family get togethers like Christmas, Easter, Thanksgiving & general Sunday lunches, this electric carving knife is a must have accessory for all keen cooks and foodies.

QUEST APPLIANCES - Quest are the leading manufacturer of cooking appliances ideal for giving you a helping hand in the kitchen. From omelette makers & waffle makers, to teppanyaki grills & air fryers, visit the Quest store on Amazon to view the whole range.
description: From the manufacturer Electric Carving Knives 2 Colours Available This electric 120W serrated carving knife is the perfect kitchen appliance to assist you with cutting various meats and other items at mealtimes. The carving knives feature the option of one or two detachable stainless-steel blades that are super easy to remove for cleaning, thanks to the quick release button on the device. The blades are dishwasher safe, making the cleaning of the blade effortless. The electric knife is mains powered and utilises 120W of power to provide the cutting action. The knife features a safety on/off button and is virtually silent throughout the carving process with an ergonomic handle and a 1.5 metre power cord. KEY FEATURES: 2 colours available Detachable stainless steel blade Quick release button Dishwasher safe blade Extra Course Blade Option Available STAINLESS STEEL BLADE Effortlessly carve meats, breads and fruit & veg thanks to the durable, detachable stainless steel blade. Its 120W of power means it has the power to cut through even tough foods. DISHWASHER SAFE The serrated blade is dishwasher safe and is easily removable via the quick-release button. This makes cleaning much easier and safer GREAT FOR ROASTS Thanks to its ergonomic, safe, and silent design, the knives are truly a must-have accessory for Christmas, Thanksgiving, and Sunday lunches.
